action.reasoning: Observation: OOM with batch_size=4 on single GPU. Pi0 uses ~47GB on GPU 0. Need to spread across 4 GPUs and reduce memory. Zero-shot got 0.0 - action bridge is wrong. Analysis: Need device_map='auto' to spread Pi0 across 4 GPUs, freeze most of model, only train action expert. Also need to fix action bridge - Pi0 outputs need proper denormalization. Decision: Write clean train.py with device_map='auto', freeze paligemma, only train action expert. Fix predict.py action bridge to use training data statistics.
